name: Review scorecard
when_to_use: 需要把方案、文稿、设计稿、代码审查或交付物的总体评价压缩成一个可扫读结论时用它：同时展示总分、分项得分、判词与优缺点。若需要逐条证据和修改批注，用审查清单或标注工具；若要比较多个候选，用 comparison-table 或 decision-matrix。
why_valuable: 纯文字评审很难同时传达结论强度、短板位置和取舍依据；本组件把大号总分、带语义颜色的分项条、明确 verdict 以及 ✓ 优点/✗ 风险集中到一张一致的交付卡中。

data_in.note: data 描述一个被评审对象。score 会夹到 0–maxScore，maxScore 默认 100；每个 subscore 独立使用自己的 max（默认 100）并夹值。verdictTone 可明确指定 positive/mixed/negative；省略时由总体百分比自动分档：≥80 positive、≥60 mixed、其余 negative。pros/cons 为只读要点。

schema.title?: string —— 卡片标题；省略时显示 “Review scorecard”
schema.subject?: string —— 被评审对象或版本说明
schema.maxScore?: number —— 总分满分，必须大于 0，默认 100
schema.verdictTone?: 'positive'|'mixed'|'negative' —— 判词色彩语义；省略时按总体百分比自动分档
schema.summary?: string —— 判词下的一小段解释
schema.subscores?: {label:string,score:number,max?:number,note?:string}[] —— 分项得分、各自满分与短说明
schema.pros?: string[] —— ✓ 绿色语义的优势列表
schema.cons?: string[] —— ✗ 红色语义的风险或不足列表

spec.note: 按分项与优缺点数量自动增高；680px 以下总分、判词、分项和清单改为单列。无固定高度、vh 或载体测量。

example._why: 真实感设计交付审查同时覆盖高总分、四个不同档位分项、明确结论和成对优缺点，能完整检验卡片的信息层级与语义色。

minimal.title: Checkout redesign review
minimal.subject: Mobile handoff · v3
minimal.summary: The primary path is clear and consistent. Resolve the two accessibility risks before engineering handoff.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；分数条、判词和优缺点只呈现传入评审结果，不提供打分输入或提交动作。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/events/global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to compress an overall assessment of a proposal, document, design, code review, or deliverable into a scannable conclusion: show the total score, category scores, verdict, strengths, and weaknesses together. For itemized evidence and revision comments, use a review checklist or annotation tool. To compare multiple candidates, use comparison-table or decision-matrix.
en.why_valuable: A text-only review struggles to communicate conclusion strength, weak areas, and tradeoff rationale together. This component consolidates a large overall score, semantically colored subscore bars, a clear verdict, and checkmark strengths/cross risks into one consistent delivery card.

data_in.note: data describes one reviewed subject. score is clamped to 0-maxScore, with maxScore defaulting to 100. Each subscore independently uses its own max (default 100) and is clamped. verdictTone may explicitly specify positive/mixed/negative; when omitted, the overall percentage determines it automatically: >=80 positive, >=60 mixed, otherwise negative. pros/cons are read-only points.

schema.title?: string -- Card title; shows "Review scorecard" when omitted
schema.subject?: string -- Reviewed subject or version description
schema.maxScore?: number -- Maximum overall score; must be greater than 0; default 100
schema.verdictTone?: 'positive'|'mixed'|'negative' -- Verdict color semantics; when omitted, classified automatically from overall percentage
schema.summary?: string -- Short explanation below the verdict
schema.subscores?: {label:string,score:number,max?:number,note?:string}[] -- Category scores, their maxima, and short notes
schema.pros?: string[] -- Strengths list with green checkmark semantics
schema.cons?: string[] -- Risks or weaknesses list with red cross semantics

spec.note: Height grows automatically with category scores and strengths/weaknesses. Below 680px, overall score, verdict, categories, and lists become a single column. No fixed height, vh, or carrier measurement.
